description: Continuous code quality platform that automatically detects bugs, vulnerabilities, and code smells across multiple programming languages, providing comprehensive static analysis to improve software maintainability, security, and reliability.
name: SonarQube

indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by scanning for code smells, cyclomatic complexity, and duplication — giving a debt rating (A–E) and estimating remediation effort in developer-days.
indicators.Security: measures Security by detecting OWASP Top 10 and CWE patterns via static analysis, assigning hotspot severity and providing fix guidance.
indicators.Reliability: measures Testing by integrating with coverage tools to surface untested critical paths and tracking coverage trends across releases.

useCases: Block low-quality merges by configuring quality gates in a CI/CD pipeline
Track code health trends over time to demonstrate maintainability improvements before publication
Run pre-release security audits on research software before making it publicly available
